name: Shadow 12x12 Horse Paddock Plan - An Enclosed Run-In Shelter for Equine Comfort & Protection
open_features: The lean-to roof design promotes efficient rain runoff while providing reliable shade and weather coverage.
Solid side and rear walls protect horses from wind, rain, and sun while keeping the front open for easy access and natural ventilation.
Simple framing, standard lumber dimensions, and clear build logic make this paddock ideal for DIY builders, ranch owners, and homesteaders.
Natural wood construction with clean lines creates a practical, professional look that pairs well with barns, fencing, and pasture layouts.
description_summary: Kickstart your next pasture or ranch upgrade with the Shadow Horse Paddock Plan - a 12x12 enclosed run-in shelter designed to provide dependable shade, wind protection, and everyday comfort for horses. Featuring a single-slope roof, partially enclosed side and back walls, and an open front entry, Shadow offers a secure, calm environment while maintaining excellent airflow and visibility. Whether you're building a horse run-in shelter, feeding paddock, resting stall, or a compact livestock sha...
